requirement_topic.en: Battery and charger material disclosure for cordless power tools
requirement_topic.zh: 无绳电动工具电池与充电器材料披露
requirement_topic.zht: 無繩電動工具電池與充電器材料揭露

summary.en: For cordless power tools, exporters should prepare model-level documentation for battery packs and chargers in the Indonesia file, including chemistry, rated capacity, protective function coverage, and material disclosure consistency with the in-scope safety route. Material or battery documentation should be aligned to the same model that carries SNI and SPPT-SNI obligations.
summary.zh: 对无绳电动工具而言，出口商应在印尼文件中按型号提供电池组和充电器资料，包括化学体系、额定容量、保护功能覆盖范围和与适用 SNI 及 SPPT-SNI 路径一致的材料披露。
summary.zht: 對無繩電動工具而言，出口商應在印尼文件中按型號提供電池組與充電器資料，包括化學體系、額定容量、保護功能覆蓋範圍及與適用 SNI 與 SPPT-SNI 路徑一致的材料揭露。

standards_or_laws: Indonesian product-file expectations for battery-supported cordless tools under SNI scope
Conformity-route alignment where SNI obligations include sub-assemblies and connected accessories
Battery-related evidence consistency rules for import declaration and traceability

summary.en: China documentation often bundles tools and battery/charger disclosures in a single GB 3883 package and may include separate lithium documentation where applicable. This is useful for technical baseline, but it does not by itself map the Indonesian requirement for model-specific subassembly accountability.
summary.zh: 中国资料常将工具及电池/充电器信息捆绑在单一 GB 3883 文件内，并按需要附带电池资料。该资料可用于技术基线，但不能自动映射印尼对机型层面子组件责任的要求。
summary.zht: 中國資料常將工具及電池／充電器資訊捆綁在單一 GB 3883 文件內，並按需要附帶電池資料。該資料可作為技術基線，但不能自動映射印尼對機型層面子組件責任的要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T lithium battery supporting documentation where relevant
CCC where applicable to the product scope

gap.en: The gap is granularity. Combined tooling dossiers can be incomplete for Indonesia when battery and charger evidence is not split by model and not cross-linked to the exact SNI scope line item, even if electrical safety data exists.
gap.zh: 差距在于颗粒度。若未按型号拆分电池与充电器证据并与准确的 SNI 范围条目挂钩，即使有电气安全数据也可能不足。
gap.zht: 差距在於粒度。若未按型號拆分電池與充電器證據並與準確的 SNI 範圍條目掛鉤，即使有電氣安全資料也可能不足。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the tool configuration places battery or charger modules under the same mandatory SNI compliance package, because traceable component-level disclosures are required for market traceability.
mandatory_status.cn: China domestic bundling and GB/CCC evidence is common, but it does not remove the need for Indonesian component-level traceability in the SNI compliance file.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Prepare battery and charger files by model and tie them to Indonesian SNI evidence and importer-facing traceability, because bundled China-only disclosure can be accepted for engineering only, not for Indonesian market-file accountability.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应按型号准备电池和充电器文件，并将其与印尼 SNI 证据及进口商对外界面的追溯要求挂钩，因为仅有中国式捆绑披露只能用于工程参考，不能直接满足印尼市场文件责任。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應按型號準備電池和充電器文件，並將其與印尼 SNI 證據及進口商對外界面的追溯要求掛鉤，因為僅有中國式捆綁揭露只能用於工程參考，不能直接滿足印尼市場文件責任。

requirement_topic.zh: 电压频率与电池动力产品标签及文件
requirement_topic.zht: 電壓頻率與電池動力產品標籤及文件

summary.en: Some cordless tool flows also require declaration of energy context and electrical characteristics for the intended use category, such as the 230 V, 50 Hz supply profile used for local filing, while battery chemistry and charger compatibility remain model-specific. This supports both safety traceability and any ESDM energy-labeling context where the tool category is treated as an appliance class.
summary.zh: 部分无绳工具路径还需声明面向当地的能源与电气特性，如供电场景的230 V、50 Hz，以及电池化学体系和充电器兼容性需按型号明确。该信息同时支持安全追溯和适用 ESDM 能源标识分类下的文件要求。
summary.zht: 部分無繩工具路徑還需宣示面向當地的能源與電氣特性，例如供電場景的 230 V、50 Hz，以及電池化學體系和充電器相容性需按型號明確。該資訊同時支持安全追溯與適用 ESDM 能源標識分類下的文件要求。

standards_or_laws: Energy-labeling context for appliance-like electrical products under ESDM-linked programs
Model-specific technical declarations for voltage, frequency, and battery compatibility
Traceability and correctness obligations in Indonesian import records

summary.en: China evidence may include China-based energy-labeling and voltage declarations from internal technical files, but these are commonly focused on China domestic context and are not an automatic basis for Indonesia-facing declarations where model, category, and filing path differ.
summary.zh: 中国资料可能包含国内语境下的能效标签和电压声明，但通常偏重中国市场场景，不能自动转换为印尼面向文件，尤其当型号、类别和申报路径不同的时候。
summary.zht: 中國資料可能包含中國本土語境下的節能標籤和電壓聲明，但通常偏重中國市場場景，不能自動轉換為印尼面向文件，尤其當型號、類別與申報路徑不同時。

standards_or_laws: GB 3883 and related tool technical filings
China product energy-label references where applicable

gap.en: The gap is contextual. A technically compliant China file may leave model-level Indonesian declarations incomplete if energy context and component compatibility are not restated for 230 V, 50 Hz and local filing rules.
gap.zh: 差距具有场景属性。中国技术合规文件在模型级未按印尼 230 V、50 Hz 和当地申报规则重述能源上下文与组件兼容性时，仍会形成差距。
gap.zht: 差距具有情境屬性。中國技術合規文件在未按印尼 230 V、50 Hz 及當地申報規則重述能源情境與組件相容性時，仍會形成差距。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where energy labeling context and technical declarations are requested by local filing requirements or in-scope market documentation rules.
mandatory_status.cn: China technical declarations are mandatory for export documentation, but Indonesia-facing voltage, frequency, and compatibility statements are destination-specific and must be recreated in local format.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat battery-powered power-tool filing as a Indonesia-specific documentation workflow, not a copy of China exports. Model-level declarations for 230 V, 50 Hz context and battery compatibility should be explicit before clearance claims are made.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 将电池动力工具文件视为印尼特定文件流程，而非直接复制中国资料。清关前应明确 230 V、50 Hz 场景及电池兼容性的机型级声明。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 將電池動力工具文件視為印尼特定文件流程，而非直接複製中國資料。清關前應明確 230 V、50 Hz 場景及電池相容性的機型級聲明。
